title: Ask, Collaborate, Explore, or Delegate to AI?
titleCandidates: Ask, Collaborate, Explore, or Delegate to AI?
The 4 AI Work Modes: Choose the Right One for Every Task
Stop Using AI the Same Way for Every Task
description:
The best AI workflow is not always the most autonomous one. This video gives you a practical four-mode map for deciding when to ask AI, collaborate with it, explore an uncertain problem, or delegate specified execution.

What you'll learn:
- How to separate human intensity from agent intensity before choosing a workflow
- When asking, collaboration, exploration, and delegation each fit the task
- How to switch modes, set stop conditions, and review observable evidence without losing outcome ownership

Chapters:
00:00 Preface
00:55 Two Axes
02:36 Asking
04:08 Collaboration
05:45 Exploration
07:18 Delegation
08:58 Switch Modes
10:29 Summary

Follow Tiny Agent, master practical AI Agent knowledge, and become someone who gets real work done with AI.

#AIWorkModes #AIAgents #HumanAICollaboration #AgenticAI #TinyAgent
